title: pseudoconyza viscosa
intro: Pseudoconyza viscosa, also known as Sticky Everlasting or Sticky Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. Pseudoconyza viscosa is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Pseudoconyza viscosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
